abilities.name: 통찰
abilities.description: 상대가 지닌 물건을 알 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.
It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.
